---
title: 'God Uses Batman To Say I Love You!'
date: '2014-07-07T04:47:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3848871313412111467'
blogger_filename: '/2014/07/god-uses-batman-to-say-i-love-you.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Spiritual Growth'
---

<h3></h3><h3>Batman Means: "I Love You!"</h3><h3><div style="font-size: medium; font-weight: normal;"><br /></div></h3><div><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody><tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20131013-174116-0753abb522cd.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img alt="Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com Sound Board Settings Look Like Batman Signal" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20131013-174116-0753abb522cd.jpg" height="299" title="Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com Sound Board Settings Look Like Batman Signal" width="400" /></a></td></tr><tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Attribution: DarrellWolfe.Com&nbsp;</td></tr></tbody></table><br /><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><br /></div><h4>Batman Hiding In The Soundboard:</h4><br />Some time ago I was working on the <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CaiUXHxD9zU" target="_blank">Digico SD7</a>&nbsp;sound board&nbsp;@<a class="g-profile" href="https://plus.google.com/113284816242244797515" target="_blank">+GatewayPeople</a>&nbsp;Church, in Southlake TX. &nbsp;As we went over all the settings for the set list that night, it occurred to me that the setting on one of the&nbsp;<a href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Caj%C3%B3n" target="_blank">Cajon</a>&nbsp;mics looked like.... Batman!<br /><br />My oldest has really been into Batman, so I brought the picture home to show him, and he really enjoyed it! Some might call this random.<br /><br /><h4>I See God.&nbsp;</h4><br />I don't believe in random. There is no such thing as luck, ever.<br /><br />There are three forces at play in this world, and none of them are random.<br /><br /><ul><li>God's Kingdom: (always brings good/blessing).&nbsp;</li><li>Satan's kingdom: (always brings theft, killing, and destruction).&nbsp;</li><li>Man's Free Will: (the most random element of the three, responds to these).</li></ul>When these three come crashing down on each other things go flying in different directions.<br /><br />Yet in the midst of it all... GRACE is there.<br /><br /><h4>I See Opportunity</h4><br />Grace gave me the gift of Batman to bring home to my son. Grace gave my son a gift, not just of Batman, but a moment with his father to laugh and smile. That moment may, or may not, ever become a conscious memory for him; however, it will be an impression on his heart/spirit. As those impressions build they will create in him a force which will propel him into his future.<br /><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><i><b>I was reminded today that my son doesn't belong to me, he belongs to God! <a href="http://ctt.ec/0uA4J" target="_blank">Tweet That!</a></b></i></blockquote><br />I am but his steward, his shepherd.<br /><br />I am here to tend to him, feed him, train him, keep him safe, provide an environment where he can grow up to hear God for himself. I am to train him in the Spirit, so that by the time he is old enough to make his own choices in the world, he is a force to be reckoned with. The Kingdom of God will be so strong in him, that darkness cannot stand in his presence, or in the presence of his generation.<br /><br />If I never minister to another single person, he (and my wife, my other son, and any other kids to come) are to be, and remain, my first priority. They are to be the first ones to receive any good thing the Father has put in me. Only when they are prospering through my ministry to them, can I minister to others in any meaningful way.<br /><br /><br /><br /><h4>I See Love and Grace</h4><br />I choose today, to stop... and smell the roses.<br /><br />I choose to be less hurried. I choose to get up a little earlier and spend time waiting on God.<br /><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><a href="http://empoweredtooprosper.blogspot.com/2014/07/the-2014-journal-template.html" target="_blank">Being STILL</a>, and knowing He is God!&nbsp;</blockquote><br />I choose to see the patterns that others miss.<br /><br />When I see God doing something I'll be sensitive to it, and listen to Him for it, and see what He is doing for me, to me, through me. I'll see what He wants to say, or how I can participate.<br /><br />God might be sending me a ground breaking message to take to Africa today... OR... he might just be showing me Batman, to demonstrate a message to a little boy:<br /><br /><blockquote class="tr_bq"><b>He loves you... just like you are!</b></blockquote><br /><h4>By&nbsp;<a href="https://plus.google.com/+DarrellWolfe/posts" target="_blank">Darrell Wolfe</a></h4><div><a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/about-20.html" style="font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', serif;" target="_blank">About This Blog, and Darrell.&nbsp;</a><br /><br /></div><div><h4><br />This Weeks Resource:</h4><div><span style="font-weight: bold;"></span></div><div><br /><ul><li>The Ministry Of: <a href="http://www.deansikes.net/" target="_blank"><b>Dean Sikes</b></a>&nbsp;is a true inspiration to experience. He specializes in ministering to <b>youth </b>one single message, one clarion call: <a href="http://youmatter.us/" target="_blank"><b>YOU MATTER</b></a>!&nbsp;</li></ul><br /><br /><br /><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;"><i><span style="line-height: 16.363636016845703px;">Affiliate Disclosure:</span></i></span><br /><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;"><i><span style="line-height: 16.363636016845703px;">I earn&nbsp;commissions&nbsp;off of some of my suggestions.&nbsp;</span></i><i style="line-height: 16.363636016845703px;">Full Disclaimers (<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/about-20.html" target="_blank">Click Here</a>)</i><br /><i>See my Store for more suggestions (<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/books-resources.html" rel="nofollow" target="_blank">Click Here</a>)</i></span><br /><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;"><i><br /></i></span><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;"><i><br /></i></span></div><h4>And now I leave you with a question:</h4><blockquote class="tr_bq"><b>What&nbsp;Pattern Has God Been Showing You Lately?&nbsp;</b></blockquote><div><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;">To Respond Leave A Comment on This Post</span><br /><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;"><br /></span><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;"><br /></span><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;"><br /></span><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;"><br /></span><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;"><br /></span><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;"><br /></span></div><div><span style="font-family: Georgia, Times New Roman, serif;"><br /></span></div><div></div></div>
